loading.dbError: Could not initialize the database. Check logs.
loading.firstLaunchInfo: First launch may take several seconds.

uiLanguage.title: Interface language
uiLanguage.subtitle: Choose app language independently from course language.

darkTheme.title: Dark theme
darkTheme.subtitle: Switch interface between light and dark mode.

vibrations.title: Vibration
vibrations.subtitle: Short vibrations during key app interactions.

disableReactions.title: Disable reactions
disableReactions.subtitle: Mutes quote/reaction bubbles in the app. Does not affect course notifications.

layoutSelector.title: Choose box layout
layoutSelector.subtitle: Preferred flashcard list view during study.

actionsSelector.title: Choose button layout
actionsSelector.subtitle: Choose button placement in true/false and know/don't know modes.

highContrast.title: High contrast
highContrast.subtitle: Switches interface colors to higher contrast variants.

largeFont.title: Larger font
largeFont.subtitle: Increases base font size in the app.

spellcheck.title: Spell checking
spellcheck.subtitle: Allows one typo during answer check.

keyboardSuggestions.title: Keyboard suggestions
keyboardSuggestions.subtitle: Enable or disable suggestions and autocorrect in flashcards. Note: some keyboards (Samsung, Gboard) may still show suggestions.

ignoreDiacritics.title: Ignore diacritics
ignoreDiacritics.subtitle: Compare words without diacritics, e.g. ą -> a.

errors.exportGoogleDrive: Could not export data to Google Drive.

exportFile.title: Export saved
exportFile.shareSupported: Share sheet opened - choose Save/Share or cancel.
exportFile.shareUnsupported: System sharing is unavailable on this platform. Copy the file manually.

exportDrive.readyMessage:
Prepared file:
{{fileUri}}

Size: {{sizeKb}} kB

Choose Google Drive in share sheet to save a copy.
exportDrive.cancelMessage: Share sheet was closed. Data was not sent to Google Drive.
exportDrive.unsupportedMessage: System sharing is not available on this device.
exportDrive.incompleteMessage: Could not finish sharing. Try again and choose Google Drive.

importDone.title: Import completed

resetLearningConfirm.title: Restore learning settings
resetLearningConfirm.message: Restore default settings (spellcheck, diacritics, box faces, layout, batch, reminders)?

exportUserData.title: Export user data
exportUserData.subtitle: Progress, box states, and custom courses will be saved as JSON file on device storage.

exportGoogleDrive.title: Export to Google Drive
exportGoogleDrive.subtitle: Open share sheet and choose Google Drive to save JSON copy.

importUserData.title: Import user data
importUserData.subtitle: Load progress and courses from JSON file.

resetLearning.title: Restore learning settings
resetLearning.subtitle: Spellcheck, diacritics, box faces, layout, batch size, reminders.

alerts.missingCourseMessage: Select a custom flashcard course in settings.
alerts.clearStorageMessage: Removes ALL stored settings (also outside settings). Dev only.
alerts.deleteDbMessage: Deletes local mygame.db (flashcards/custom). App restart required.
alerts.introResetDone: Intro reset. Onboarding starts from language selection.

testPopup.title: Test Boxik popup
testPopup.subtitle: Preview message (development only).
testPopup.message: Hey! It's me, Boxik. Popup works!

hangul.title: Test Hangul keyboard
hangul.subtitle: Type Korean characters without system keyboard.

logoMessage.title: Add course with code
logoMessage.description: This is your flashcard space. Start by pinning a course with teacher's code.

addCustomReviews.title: Add custom reviews
addCustomReviews.subtitle: Insert random flashcards from active custom course.

rows.selectCourseInfo: First select a custom course in courses panel.

resetCustom.title: Reset custom course (dev)
resetCustom.subtitle: Delete review entries for active custom course.

resetIntro.title: Reset intro bubbles
resetIntro.subtitle: Removes seen flags for all screens.

openLanguageIntro.title: Go to language selection
openLanguageIntro.subtitle: Open the first onboarding screen with PL/EN flags.

learningReminders.title: Learning reminders (dev)
learningReminders.subtitle: Quick toggle for unreleased reminders feature.

statsFire.title: Stats: fire animation (dev)
statsFire.subtitle: Shows animated flames in mastered words background.

statsBookshelf.title: Stats: bookshelf cabinet (dev)
statsBookshelf.subtitle: Shows bookshelf/trophies module on stats screen.

languageIntro.title: Choose your native language
languageIntro.hintDefault: Choose a language to enable the button.

step1.title: Activate course
step1.description: This is where you activate a course. Games will use flashcards from the active course.

step2.title: Course settings
step2.description: Each course has its own settings that you can change anytime.

step1.title: Hi, I'm Memicard
step1.description: I'll guide you through the app. Let's start by picking courses.

step2.title: Pin a few courses
step2.description: At start, pick courses you care about. You can pin more than one for faster access.

step3.title: After pinning, tap Next
step3.description: Bottom button will enable after you pin at least one course.

step4.title: Custom courses!
step4.description: Later you'll be able to create your own courses with your own flashcards! :3

step1.title: This is the main game
step1.description: Inspired by the Leitner system. This is where we learn words.

step2.title: Game goal
step2.description: Goal is to move a flashcard through all boxes.

step3.title: Activate a box
step3.description: By tapping a box, you activate it and draw a new flashcard.

step4.title: Give an answer
step4.description: A drawn flashcard appears. Depending on type, answer or tap a button.

step5.title: Too complicated?
step5.description: If something is unclear, check the guide on home screen via my top-bar avatar.

step2.title: Choose review mode
step2.description: Start is a quick mini-game session. Traditional is classic translation typing.

step3.title: After session
step3.description: At the end of both modes you'll see a summary table.

step1.title: Choose a course for reviews
step1.description: Tap a tile to open the game and review flashcards from this course.

step2.title: How often do they appear?
step2.description: Maybe in 2 days, maybe in a week, maybe in a year. To remember, first you need to forget ;)

step3.title: What do the numbers mean?
step3.description: Red number means overdue reviews. Green means nothing is waiting now.

step4.title: Disabling reviews
step4.description: You can disable reviews in course settings - then it won't appear on this list.
